name: Baked Potato Soup I
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and dice the potatoes.
2. Cook in water until tender.
3. Drain the potatoes.
4. Return the potatoes to the saucepan.
5. Add milk and heat slowly, ensuring it does not boil.
6. Gradually add butter, sour cream, bacon, chopped green onions, and shredded Cheddar cheese.
7. Continue cooking until the butter, sour cream, and cheese are mostly melted.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve immediately, garnishing with additional green onions, cheese, and sour cream if desired.
